articles.title: Judge dismisses lawsuit of Babson College student mistakenly deported to Honduras
articles.description:
“The sad truth is that when Any declined the flight she also waived this court's only remaining basis for jurisdiction,” the judge ruled.

The post Judge dismisses lawsuit of Babson College student mistakenly deported to Honduras appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Judge dismisses lawsuit of Babson College student Any after deportation to Honduras.
Court ruled Any waived jurisdiction by declining the flight back to the U.S.
Decision highlights legal vulnerabilities for international students in Boston.
